expectations.text: Provides the correct monitoring base URL: monitoring.tokenfactory.nebius.com
expectations.evidence: Uses generic vLLM metric names and mentions '<token-factory-host>:<metrics-port>' without specifying monitoring.tokenfactory.nebius.com

expectations.text: Includes PromQL for p95 TTFT using histogram_quantile(0.95, ...)
Includes PromQL for requests per minute using rate()

expectations.evidence: Only mentions adding Prometheus as a data source in general terms; no concrete datasource configuration block
No mention of bearer token or any authentication mechanism for accessing the metrics endpoint
